metadata.description: Autonoma plugins for AI-powered E2E test generation

plugins.name: autonoma-test-planner
plugins.description: Generates comprehensive E2E test cases through a validated multi-step pipeline with deterministic validation. Includes generate-tests (full suite) and generate-adhoc-tests (focused topic) commands.

plugins.name: autonoma-test-planner-development
plugins.description: [DEVELOPMENT] Generates comprehensive E2E test cases through a validated multi-step pipeline with deterministic validation. Includes generate-tests (full suite) and generate-adhoc-tests (focused topic) commands.
